response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to have a critical eye when viewing posts. Don't always believe what you see, especially if it seems too good (or bad) to be true. Instead, fact-check by cross-referencing information from reputable sources. If you find that a post is false, report it to the platform and consider blocking the account responsible. Additionally, use privacy settings to control who can interact with your content and reduce the chances of fake accounts interacting with you. Lastly, be mindful of how much time you spend on social media and take breaks from it regularly."
,"reasoning_summary": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, one should have a critical eye when viewing posts, fact-check information by cross-referencing reputable sources, report false posts to the platform, use privacy settings to control interactions, and take breaks from social media regularly.",

}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is important to have a critical eye when viewing posts. Don't always believe what you see, especially if it seems too good (or bad) to be true. Instead, fact-check by cross-referencing information from reputable sources. If you find that a post is false, report it to the platform and consider blocking the account responsible. Additionally, use privacy settings to control who can interact with your content and reduce the chances of fake accounts interacting with you. Lastly, be mindful of how much time you spend on social media and take breaks from it regularly.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, one should have a critical eye when viewing posts, fact-check information by cross-referencing reputable sources, report false posts to the platform, use privacy settings to control interactions, and take breaks from social media regularly.
